title: Courgette Confit with Pickled Herbs
description: A tangy, velvety Venezuelan dish featuring courgettes and pickled herbs, perfect for a cozy dinner.
instructions: Clean and peel the courgettes, then slice them into thick rounds.
Halve the red onions and thinly slice them. Chop the garlic cloves.
In a large skillet or saucepan, heat olive oil over medium heat. Add sliced onions and sauté until translucent.
Add chopped garlic, thyme leaves, oregano twigs, and courgette slices to the pan. Season with salt.
Pour in enough water to cover the vegetables by about an inch. Bring to a simmer, then reduce the heat to low. Cover partially and cook for 1 hour or until tender-crisp.
Add pickled herbs during the last 30 minutes of cooking, stirring occasionally.
Let the dish cool slightly before serving. Garnish with fresh thyme leaves if desired.
